visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a medium close-up of a young woman with long dark hair, wearing two hair clips and a blue-and-grey furry zip-up sweater. She sits at a wooden table with a Starbucks cup and a professional microphone in front of her, gesturing with her hands as she speaks toward someone off-camera. The background consists of dark teal curtains and a dimly lit indoor setting. (2) The scene cuts to a man wearing a brown shirt and large white studio headphones, holding a smartphone and looking down at it while listening. The lighting is warm and focused on his upper body. (3) A third person, a man in a black shirt, is shown in a medium shot. He is sitting in a room filled with various collectible figures and posters, speaking calmly with a serious facial expression. (4) The sequence continues to cut between these three individuals as they engage in a seated discussion. Throughout the conversation, large yellow and white text overlays appear on the screen, periodically accompanied by numbered graphics (1. 2. 3. 4.) to indicate distinct points or steps in the dialogue. (5) A brief insert features a person wearing an orange masked head with a painted face and a blue polka-dot shirt, appearing in a split-screen format for a moment of reaction. The main characters remain seated in their respective studio environments until the end of the clip.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 手足的衝突. [Logo]: @蔡阿嘎543. (2) [Subtitle]: 我們到底要不要介入. (3) [Subtitle]: 我以前一開始一定會馬上介入. (4) [Subtitle]: 但我現在在學習. (5) [Subtitle]: 我會忍住. (6) [Subtitle]: 所以到底怎樣會比較好. (7) [Subtitle]: 比如說搶玩具. (8) [Subtitle]: 你可以讓他們發現. (9) [Subtitle]: 我在看他們. (10) [Subtitle]: 在觀察在觀察. (11) [Subtitle]: 那動手了呢. (12) [Subtitle]: 你就當下就要介入了. (13) [Variety]: 1. 先分開. [Subtitle]: 分開他們. (14) [Subtitle]: 不要當裁判決定. (15) [Subtitle]: 誰對誰錯. (16) [Subtitle]: 沒有. (17) [Variety]: 2. 輪流表達. [Subtitle]: 輪流讓兩個人表達!!!. (18) [Subtitle]: A先說的時候. (19) [Subtitle]: B安靜. (20) [Subtitle]: 但是B不用擔心. (21) [Subtitle]: 我也會給你同樣的時間. (22) [Subtitle]: 讓你暢所欲言. (23) [Variety]: 3. 同理感受. [Subtitle]: 讓兩個人都覺得. (24) [Subtitle]: 我們在乎他的感受.想法. (25) [Subtitle]: 他們就會在那邊. (26) [Variety]: (老師模仿兩人吵架聲音). (27) [Subtitle]: 等一下. (28) [Subtitle]: 媽媽等一下會讓你講. (29) [Variety]: 注意這個身體語言. [Subtitle]: 注意這個身體語言. (30) [Subtitle]: 因為這個是有說服力的. (31) [Subtitle]: 你不要. (32) [Subtitle]: 等一下媽媽讓你講. (33) [Subtitle]: 那不對. (34) [Variety]: 4. 討論解決方式. [Subtitle]: 我了解了. (35) [Subtitle]: 那你們覺得. (36) [Subtitle]: 現在可以怎麼樣. (37) [Subtitle]: 我要拿回來!!!. (38) [Subtitle]: 我想要先玩!!!. (39) [Subtitle]: 沒有共識. (40) [Subtitle]: 等你有共識下次再玩. (41) [Subtitle]: 哦~~. (42) [Subtitle]: 先連結感情. (43) [Subtitle]: 再處理事件. (44) [Subtitle]: 那大人要急著做的. (45) [Subtitle]: 不是解決問題. (46) [Subtitle]: 是安定自己內在!!. (47) [Subtitle]: 你懂得安定自己. (48) [Subtitle]: 才懂得安定他們. (49) [Subtitle]: 難是難在成人的安定. (50) [Subtitle]: 老師的課程我看了一下. (51) [Subtitle]: 非常豐富. (52) [Subtitle]: 47個單元. (53) [Subtitle]: 從認識什麼是安定教養. (54) [Subtitle]: 先安定自己開始. (55) [Subtitle]: 然後慢慢到教養孩子. (56) [Subtitle]: 然後有各種情況. (57) [Subtitle]: 怎麼去因應. (58) [Subtitle]: 小朋友在外面大吵大鬧. (59) [Subtitle]: 不吃飯.不收玩具. (60) [Logo]: @蔡阿嘎543. [Slogan]: 完整影片請上蔡阿嘎543頻道收看. [Subtitle]: 0~12歲都受用.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female speaker, 1 male speaker in black, 1 male listener in brown, and 1 masked figure appearing briefly.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young female with black hair clips in a blue/grey fuzzy sweater; a man with dark hair in a black button-down shirt; another man with reddish-brown hair in a dark brown shirt wearing headphones.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio starts with a female voice speaking in a clear, conversational tone with moderate pitch and friendly resonance. A soft, upbeat acoustic guitar BGM plays consistently in the background at a low volume. (2) A male voice interjects briefly with a lower pitch, acting as a listener and secondary speaker. (3) A distinct 'ding' sound effect triggers as a second male voice takes over the primary narration. He speaks with a professional, educational tone, exhibiting clear articulation and a steady cadence. (4) Around the midpoint, the male speaker suddenly shifts his vocal pitch higher to mimic the sounds of arguing children, shouting with high emotional arousal and increased intensity. This sequence is accompanied by comedic cartoon-style sound effects. (5) After the imitation, the primary male speaker returns to his calm, authoritative delivery. The music continues without interruption, maintaining a stable major-key mood. The audio conclude with a short concluding remark from the first male speaker and a final melodic flourish in the BGM.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Problem -> Tip 1 -> Tip 2 -> Tip 3 -> Tip 4 -> Philosophy -> Call to Action.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide parents with structured, professional advice on how to handle sibling conflicts using specific communication techniques and self-regulation steps.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The speaker explicitly references 'the teacher's course' and a call to action to watch the full video on a specific channel is shown at the end.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A podcast-style interview format that uses numbered graphics and dynamic role-play to keep educational content engaging.
